note: PHASE II READY MINERS card renamed to UPDATED MINERS — clearer semantics (miners that have rebuilt with -DSOST_ENABLE_PHASE2_SBPOW=ON and run with --wallet/--mining-key-label, vs miners stuck on the pre-fork binary). Tooltip retained the Phase II context. Empty-state sub label now reads 'no updated miners'. Pulse logic, blue text and counter behaviour from v128 unchanged.
